overall.description: A cinematic Unreal Engine 5 scene depicting a medieval fantasy courtyard or pavilion, likely from a wizard school setting. Characters in dark robes mill about wooden tables under a timber-framed shelter, with warm morning sunlight streaming through the open sides and illuminating the stone floor. The camera remains stationary, capturing the ambient activity of students or monks interacting in the covered outdoor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered medieval courtyard with wooden tables

events.description: robed figure with yellow trim enters from left background and approaches foreground table
group of robed figures near center table shift positions and interact
figure in dark robes exits through doorway in the background

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of courtyard activity from fixed vantage point under the wooden pavilion

notable_agents.action: robed figure with yellow hood lining walking toward wooden table in foreground
group of three robed figures conversing near the central wooden table

entered.detail: large timber-framed shelter with exposed wooden beams and rafters overhead
sunlit stone tile flooring with shadows cast by wooden pillars
rustic wooden dining tables with benches arranged throughout the pavilion
green sloping hill visible through the open archway leading outside
steep wooden staircase ascending along the right wall
dark wooden double doors set into the back wall of the pavilion

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a medieval wooden pavilion, likely a dining hall or common area in a fantasy setting. Warm morning sunlight streams through the open sides, illuminating stone floors and rustic wooden furniture. Several characters in dark academic robes move about the space - one with distinctive yellow trim approaches a foreground table while others converse near the center. The background reveals a grassy hillside path leading away from the structure, and a wooden staircase climbs the right wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static cinematic view of a medieval wooden pavilion bathed in the soft glow of a fantasy morning. It begins by capturing the warm sunlight streaming through the open sides of the structure, highlighting the texture of the stone floors and rustic wooden furniture. As the scene unfolds, characters in dark academic robes move through the space, including one with distinctive yellow trim who approaches a foreground table while others converse in the center. The perspective then expands to reveal the surrounding environment, shifting focus toward a grassy hillside path leading away from the pavilion and a wooden staircase climbing the right wall.
